content.en:
Ten Dimensional Heavenly Gate.

Ye Tian came here, he had passed the sixth level before, and he had never gone through the seventh level.

Soon, he came to the seventh level.

A gatekeeper located in the seventh level fought with Ye Tian, but was killed by Ye Tian in seconds.

Beat the seventh level.

Then, Ye Tian was still the keeper of the eighth level of the second kill, and then came to the ninth level.

Similarly, the keeper of the ninth level is very powerful, but under Ye Tian's supreme mastery of the four realms, it is still a one-trick kill.

Subsequently, Ye Tian came to the tenth level, which is also a level that no one has broken through so far.

Level 10.

After Ye Tian entered here, he saw a guardian of the Fifth Realm.

"The Fifth Realm!"

Ye Tian was surprised, he thought he was the gatekeeper of the fourth realm.

But if you think about it carefully, the guardians of the Fourth Realm, even with the blessing of the Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower, can have the combat power of the Ninth Heavenly Pass is already the limit, and it is impossible to exert the combat power of the Tenth Heaven Pass.

So.

The keeper of the tenth level is a fifth realm, which is reasonable.

However, the state of this Fifth Realm was not quite right, and it had already been reduced to a puppet of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Gate Tower. 25

"Kill!"

Ye Tian fought with this Fifth Realm Mansion, and this was also the first time he had faced off with the Fifth Realm.

Rumble!!!!!

The strength of this Fifth Realm is extremely terrifying, every move and style is a multi-dimensional mastery of the four realms, and the ninth dimension will mastery is also one after another, and the opponent's super-dimensional rule realm is also a dimensional rule.

In an instant, this area was in the other's dimensional void.

Ye Tian also urged a set of dimensional rules to create his own dimension, and the two dimensions constantly collided.

"Multi-dimensional sword blade, slash!"

Ye Tian held the Innate Multi-Dimensional Supreme Treasure Firmament Wooden Blade and cast a multi-dimensional sword blade.

Tear and pull!

The other party's dimension was directly cut by Ye Tian and slashed on the opponent's body.

If you can't even cut through the dimension, you won't be able to hurt the other party at all.

This is also the power of the rules of one dimension!

Thundered!!!!

Ye Tian and this Fifth Realm continued to kill, I don't know how long it has been, the other party's injuries have worsened, this is the terrible of the Supreme Peerless Learning, even the Fifth Realm is difficult to recover from the injuries caused by the Supreme Peerless Learning.

For example, that Sixth Realm Multidimensional Life, after being killed, contained the power of supreme mastery in his blood.

Finally.

Ye Tian once again unleashed a multi-dimensional sword blade, combined with the firmament wooden blade, directly penetrating the opponent's body, completely crushing his physical body.

I saw that the body of this Fifth Realm collapsed, and he actually fell directly, and he was not resurrected like other gatekeepers.

Meanwhile.

The other extra-dimensional realms that were still breaking through the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower were all moved out of the Ten Dimensional Heaven Pass Tower, leaving only Ye Tian alone.

Rumble!

An illusory shadow descended, and it was a wisp of residual will of the Heavenly Dimension Realm Lord.

That is, relying on the ten-dimensional Heavenly Gate Tower, this wisp of will can be maintained without dissipation.

This wisp of residual will has been sleeping in the ten-dimensional heavenly gate tower, once someone breaks through the tenth level, he will appear, but it will also quickly crumble and dissipate.

"You are very good, you have really passed the tenth level of the Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Gateway, from today onwards, this Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Pagoda will belong to you. This is the innate multi-dimensional treasure of the Thirteen Tribulations, and countless Fifth Realms want it. "

"I also left some treasures and placed them in the depths of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Gateway Tower, after you take charge of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Gateway Tower, you can find them. "

"I'm about to dissipate, and I can't do anything, I just want to ask you to help me kill the sixth realm of the transcendent realm, the Lord of the Broken Rain Realm, after you break through to the sixth realm in the future, you must kill this slut!"

As soon as the words fell, the residual will of the Heavenly Dimension Realm Lord completely dissipated.

"Shattered Rain Realm Lord, slut?"

Ye Tian guessed that the other party should be a woman, maybe he still had an emotional dispute with this Tianwei Realm Lord, maybe he had cheated the Tianwei Realm Lord.

However, the years of the existence of the Heavenly Dimensional Realm Lord were too long, at least two or three hundred years before the multi-dimensional tribulation, and he naturally didn't know much about it.

But since he has obtained the inheritance of the Heavenly Dimension Realm Lord, if he finds the Shattered Rain Realm Lord in the future, if he can kill the other party with his strength, he will do it easily.

......

Next, Ye Tian began to refine the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Gate Tower.

Thirteen Tribulations Innate Multi-Dimensional Treasure, this is not known how many times more advanced than the Firmament Wood Blade of the Three Tribulations Innate Multi-Dimensional Treasure, once he obtains this treasure, his confidence in protecting the human race will be even stronger.

Meanwhile.

Many of the Fifth Realms in the outside world were alarmed.

"The Ten Dimensional Heavenly Gate Tower is controlled by a certain Fourth Realm, who is it?"

"Is it the Yang Desolation Realm Lord of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Palace, he has always been the one with the highest level before. "

"Fart, Yang Huang is indeed the only eighth day pass combat power before, but if you want to take charge of the Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower, you must break through the tenth level of the Ten-Dimensional Heaven Pass Tower, and Yang Huang does not have this power. Moreover, there is also a fourth realm among your forces that is comparable to the combat power of the Eighth Heaven Pass, but it has been hidden, maybe it is the fourth realm under your command. "

All of a sudden, these Fifth Realms quarreled.

"Go to the tenth dimension, lock the location of the ten-dimensional Heavenly Gate Tower, and see if there is a fourth realm coming out. "

"Good!"

Tear and pull!

Before, they were just unable to collect the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Gate Tower, but now that the Fourth Realm was in charge of the 630 Ten Dimensional Heavenly Gate Tower, they had hope.

Time passed slowly, and they were waiting.

And Ye Tian has been refining the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Pagoda.

Finally, on this day, he successfully refined.

I also perceived the fifth realm of the outside world.

"With so many Fifth Realms, the target must be the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower!"

He didn't panic, the Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower was not so easy to catch!

"Escape!"

The Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Gate Tower shuttles through the Tenth Dimension at an extremely fast speed.

The Fifth Realm can indeed cross the Tenth Dimension, but it can't stay in the Tenth Dimension all the time, and the speed is far inferior to the Tenth Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower.

Soon, the Fifth Realm was thrown off.

After getting rid of all the Fifth Realm, Ye Tian controlled the Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower to instantly break away from the tenth dimension, and then put away the Ten Dimensional Heaven Pass Tower and immediately hid it.

Then, those Fifth Realms continued to deduce and track, but they couldn't find Ye Tian, and they couldn't deduce Ye Tian's traces, so they couldn't find anything.

Suddenly, these Fifth Realms were extremely angry.

If there were a ten-dimensional Heavenly Gate, their hope of surviving the multi-dimensional tribulation of death would have increased greatly!

Then, these Fifth Realms issued a mission order to find Ye Tian, and once they provided useful information, they would directly give a rich reward.
